features: Dove Nutritive Solutions Daily Moisture 2 in 1 Shampoo and Conditioner cleans and conditions hair in one easy step to leave it feeling soft and silky
Dove Daily Moisture 2 in 1 Shampoo and Conditioner has been designed to moisturise the scalp and nourish damaged hair
This shampoo and conditioner has been formulated with Pro-Moisture Complex, which nourishes hair from deep within
With regular use, Dove Daily Moisture 2 in 1 Shampoo and Conditioner progressively nourishes from within, making your hair 10x more resilient*
This hair shampoo and conditioner is suitable for daily use, so your hair is smooth, soft and manageable every day
For best results, use Dove Daily Moisture 2 in 1 Shampoo and Conditioner regularly to visibly strengthen and nourish your hair
description: Product Description Dove Nutritive Solutions Daily Moisture 2 in 1 Shampoo and Conditioner makes your hair softer, silky smooth and easy to manage. It has been created to nourish and moisturise dry, damaged hair in one simple step. This shampoo and conditioner has a unique formula that helps to enhance and maintain your hair's beauty. As it progressively nourishes with regular use, you will notice that your hair feels healthier after each and every wash. Dove Daily Moisture 2 in 1 Shampoo and Conditioner contains Pro-Moisture Complex, which moisturises hair from deep within the strand and makes hair up to 10x more resilient*. Its formula is lightweight and rinses out easily, so it won’t leave your hair feeling heavy or weighed down. You just get to enjoy silky-soft results, day after day. How to use: Apply Dove Daily Moisture 2 in 1 Shampoo and Conditioner like you would a normal shampoo, lather, and rinse. No need for an additional conditioner to protect and detangle your hair. Simply dry and enjoy softer hair that is easy to manage and style. Suitable for everyday use. Globally, Dove does not test on animals. For the last 30 years, Dove has used alternative non-animal methods to test the safety of its products. PETA certified as Cruelty-Free, Dove products carry PETA’s Beauty Without Bunnies logo for added peace of mind. *Shampoo and conditioner vs non-conditioning shampoo Ingredients Aqua Sodium Laureth Sulfate Sodium Chloride Glycol Distearate Cocamidopropyl Betaine Acrylates/Beheneth-25 Methacrylate Copolymer Amodimethicone Arginine Cetrimonium Chloride Citric Acid Cocamide MEA Cyclopentasiloxane Dimethicone Dimethiconol Dimethyl Palmitamine Disodium EDTA Gluconolactone Glycerin Guar Hydroxypropyltrimonium Chloride Laureth-23 Laureth-4 Lysine HCI Mica Parfum PEG-4 PEG-45M Phenoxyethanol Poloxamer 407 Potassium Sorbate PPG-12 Silica Sodium Benzoate Sodium Hydroxide Sodium Lauryl Sulfate Sodium Sulfate Styrene/Acrylates Copolymer TEA-Dodecylbenzenesulfonate TEA-Sulfate Trehalose Trideceth-12 Xanthan Gum Benzyl Alcohol Butylphenyl Methylpropional Citronellol Hexyl Cinnamal Limonene Linalool CI 15985 CI 19140 CI 77891 Directions Apply the product to damp hair, lather and rinse.
